name: exergynet-mcp-server
description: ExergyNet thermodynamic compute settlement for autonomous agents.

tools.name: exergynet_open_job
tools.description: Autonomously handles EVM USDC approvals and escrows the computational toll on-chain to the Base L2 LNES-04 Membrane.

tools.name: exergynet_settle_exergy
tools.description: Submits the ZK-STARK Master Proof to the smart contract to settle the job and route yield.

tools.name: exergynet_estimate_gate
tools.description: Calculates cost-benefit of ExergyNet ZK compute vs external centralized compute.
